series_metadata.series_description: Names, addresses, type of company, type of insurance sold by company, license date, etc. on all active and inactive companies licensed to sell insurance in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 3 years; on-site 2 years; then destroy. ; Electronic: In office 3 years; on-site 2 years; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
